name: Tarragon Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the oil, consomme, and mayonnaise in a blender.
2. Mix at high speed until smooth.
3. Empty into a bowl.
4. Slowly mix in the consomme and oil until combined.
5. When the mixture reaches the consistency of a loose puree, add the mayonnaise gradually, beating constantly with a wire whisk.
6. Chill before serving. Makes 2 quarts.
